data.title: Appriss Retail report finds $796B lost in total retail loss in 2025, covering shrink, fraud, and returns abuse.
data.description: In Irvine, California, Appriss Retail unveiled The 2026 Total Retail Loss Benchmark Report, a groundbreaking study integrating shrink, fraud, returns abuse, and operational leakage, revealing a staggering $796 billion lost to returns and shrink in 2025. This report, the first of its kind, provides a comprehensive overview of retail losses by surveying over 1,000 consumers and analyzing in-store data. It offers a holistic view of the challenges faced by retailers, connecting various aspects contributing to significant financial losses in the retail sector.

data.title: NRMP's 2026 Specialties Matching Service fills over 12,900 fellowship positions, reaching all-time high.
data.description: The Specialties Matching Service® has achieved a record high by filling over 12,900 fellowship positions. The National Resident Matching Program® (NRMP®) recently published the 2026 Appointment Year report for the Results and Data Specialties Matching Service® in Washington on February 19th, 2026.

data.title: Ferrari proposes 21% dividend increase to Euro 3.615 per share, totaling Euro 640 million to shareholders.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Maranello, Italy, Ferrari N.V. revealed plans for a dividend distribution to common shareholders at Euro 3.615 per share. This marks a notable 21% surge from the previous year's dividend. The total distribution is estimated to reach around Euro 640 million.

MORTGAGE RATES FALL NEAR 3½-YEAR LOW Mortgage rates dropped to 6.01% for a 30-year fixed loan—the lowest since September 2022—down from 6.09% last week, according to Freddie Mac. The decline could ease affordability pressures and revive activity in the stagnant housing market.

data.title: Cinema Muscle Recreations debuts EGA01, the first production vehicle, with the help of Hagerty.
data.description: A company based in Chatsworth, California, known as Cinema Muscle Recreations, recently unveiled their inaugural production vehicle named "EGA01", following the creation of "Eleanor: Gone Again". The vehicle is set to make its debut with the help of Hagerty.

data.title: Antivenom market set to reach $691.0 million by 2033 with 6.7% CAGR, driven by rising venomous bites and treatment advancements.
data.description: The worldwide market for antivenom is on the rise as a result of the growing number of venomous bites and the development of improved treatment options. A recent report by Allied Market Research, titled "Antivenom Market by Type," highlights this trend. The report, released on February 19, 2026 in WILMINGTON, Del., reveals critical insights into this expanding market sector. This growth is driven by rising incidences of venomous bites globally.

data.title: Jim Cramer questions Bitcoin's utility in times of geopolitical instability, dismissing it as an Iranian war hedge.
data.description: On Thursday, Jim Cramer used social media to raise doubts about the cryptocurrency market, particularly questioning the utility of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) during periods of geopolitical instability. As tensions between the U.S. and Iran escalate, Cramer dismissed the belief that Bitcoin serves as a safe-haven asset, refuting the notion of it being an effective hedge against Iranian war. Cramer's tweet highlighted his skepticism about Bitcoin's correlation to geopolitical events, indicating it may not provide the intended hedge in the current situation. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Monkee's of Summerville opening in downtown with curated fashion and accessories. PRNewswire, Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: A new Monkee's store is set to open in Summerville this weekend, offering a wide range of curated fashion and accessories. Located in Summerville, S.C., this nationally recognized women's boutique is renowned for its expertly selected fashion items and unique style. The store is scheduled to open on Feb. 19, 2026. Customers can expect a variety of trendy clothing and accessories all year round at this new location.

data.title: Opportune LLP promotes Linden Nicosia and Sam Stewart to Managing Director, recognizing their talent and commitment. #CareerGrowth
data.description: Houston-based global business advisory firm, Opportune LLP, has recently promoted Linden Nicosia and Sam Stewart to Managing Director positions. Both individuals initially joined the company as Consultants straight out of college, showcasing Opportune's dedication to nurturing talent within the organization. Linden Nicosia, located in Houston, has played a pivotal role in the firm's Restructuring and Lender Advisory divisions. She specializes in providing guidance to financial institutions and energy companies.

data.title: INmune Bio webinar to present new data on CORDStrom for RDEB, from MissionEB study by trial investigators.
data.description: Healthcare professionals involved in a recent trial will discuss their practical experience in treating patients with RDEB using CORDStrom. They will also reveal fresh insights from the MissionEB clinical trial.

data.title: Inventor from Smithfield creates new card/dice battle game Super Oni Samurai, combining RPG elements.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 19, 2026, an inventor from Smithfield, Virginia, shared his inspiration for creating a new game called SUPER ONI SAMURAI. The inventor aimed to develop a game that incorporated unique RPG characters and features. The game blends combat with fantasy elements, offering an immersive experience for players.

data.title: Patients with Crohn's disease on Omvoh maintained steroid-free remission for 3 years, with over 90% achieving it at 1 year. Low surgery and hospitalization rates observed.
data.description: Groundbreaking results from the VIVID-2 study demonstrated that over 90% of patients who attained remission without steroids after one year were able to sustain this steroid-free control for up to three years. Moreover, recent findings showcased remarkably low rates of surgeries and hospitalizations among individuals treated with Omvoh for Crohn's disease.

data.title: IPO stock surpasses buy point on strong preliminary revenue & outlook for 2025, current year.
data.description: The company provided an initial overview of its 2025 performance and revealed its forecast for the current year. Following this announcement, the stock surged past the buy point after its initial public offering (IPO) due to strong preliminary revenue figures and optimistic outlook.

data.title: Dow drops amid U.S.-Iran tensions, jobless claims surprise. Berkshire Hathaway stock soars. Carvana plunges.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following an unexpected increase in weekly jobless claims. Carvana stock also saw a significant drop after reporting its earnings. The market was particularly sensitive to U.S.-Iran tensions. On the positive side, Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway saw a notable increase in its holdings. This information was provided on live coverage, signaling a volatile day in the stock market.
